Upstream:         https://github.com/5ocworkshop/tui-vfx
Upstream name:    tui-vfx
Upstream version: (placeholder — project not consumed; tachyonfx replaces it)
Upstream commit:  placeholder — no upstream snapshot taken; local stub only.
Captured:         2026-04-14
Captured by:      Nathan Ribeiro <nribeiro@strm.com.br>
Purpose:          Preserved as reference for the "why we chose tachyonfx over tui-vfx"
                  rationale section in PROJECT.md. Reference reading only. Never
                  consumed as a `path =` dependency. See PROJECT.md §"Vendor policy"
                  for the full rationale.

Relationship to workspace:
    This directory is NOT a dependency. The workspace does NOT consume tui-vfx at
    all — the effect pipeline is built on tachyonfx instead. This copy exists as
    a rationale anchor: it lets future contributors compare the two libraries
    side-by-side and understand the pivot recorded in PROJECT.md. The current
    contents are a minimal local stub; a real upstream snapshot can replace it
    if a deeper comparison is ever needed.

How to refresh to a real upstream snapshot:
    1. git clone https://github.com/5ocworkshop/tui-vfx /tmp/tui-vfx-upstream
    2. git -C /tmp/tui-vfx-upstream checkout <release-tag-or-main>
    3. rm -rf vendor/_reference/tui-vfx/*
    4. cp -r /tmp/tui-vfx-upstream/{src,Cargo.toml,README.md} vendor/_reference/tui-vfx/
    5. Update this STAMP.txt: Upstream commit = `git -C /tmp/tui-vfx-upstream rev-parse HEAD`.
